summary: Applied a minimal seam polish to diversify Chapter 1's opening construction from Chapter 2's car-object opening and reduce cross-chapter repetition near the handoff while preserving all plot beats and voice.
edits: Reframed the opening paragraph to start from Eli's time-anchored POV (9:30/pass stack) rather than a broad traffic tableau scaffold.
Kept all move-in logistics and tone intact while preserving character dialogue registers and contraction levels.
Removed duplicated in-car smell wording near the chapter exit so Chapter 2's opening sensory beat lands cleaner.
Lightly tightened folder-motion phrasing on the interstate to improve momentum into the Chapter 2 transition.
